diagrams.title: Function Call vs Inline Call Flow
diagrams.description: Comparison of execution flow between normal function call and inline function call showing steps and overhead reduction
elements: Inline: Direct Code Insertion at Call Site
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how inline eliminates multiple steps and reduces execution time overhead

diagrams.title: Code Bloat Demonstration
diagrams.description: Shows how same inline function code is duplicated at each call location, increasing executable size
diagrams.purpose: Understand the trade-off between performance and memory when using inline functions

diagrams.title: Inline Function Placement in Header
diagrams.description: Diagram showing how inline functions are typically placed in header files and included in multiple translation units
elements: Compilation: Each TU gets function definition
Linking: No multiple definition error (ODR exemption)
diagrams.purpose: Understand why inline functions belong in headers and the ODR exemption
